name: Thai Red Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 Jalapeno peppers, cut into thin strips
1 lb Chicken breast, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3/4 cup of coconut milk in a pot until boiling.
2. Add the red curry paste and stir until evenly blended.
3. Add the chicken and continue cooking at medium heat until thoroughly cooked.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: chopped zuccini, jalapeno peppers, fish sauce, and basil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer until boiling again.
6. Remove from heat and serve over rice. This dish reheats nicely.
